name: WormBot
description: Multi-language code analyzer and auto-fixer. Wraps worm_bot's native modules. Python/JS/CSS/HTML/JSON/Markdown auto-fix ON. Rust scan-only — V reviews.
author: Victory

tools.name: wormbot_fix
tools.description: Analyze and auto-fix code. Input: language|code. Auto-fix on for Python/JS/CSS/HTML/JSON/Markdown. Rust scan-only.

tools.name: wormbot_scan
tools.description: Scan a file on disk — analyze and fix in place if auto-fix enabled

tools.name: wormbot_diff
tools.description: Show diff between original and fixed code from last run

tools.name: wormbot_report
tools.description: WormBot activity report — files scanned, fixed, issues found

tools.name: wormbot_apply
tools.description: Apply last Rust fix suggestion after V review
